## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation)
- [ ] refactor (non-functional code changes)
- [ ] test (test-only changes)
- [ ] chore (build/tooling)

## Related Issue

Closes #<issue_number> (if applicable)

## Validation

- [ ] `./mvnw test` passes locally
- [ ] Extension behavior manually verified (if UI changed)
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior/API changed)

## Screenshots / Recordings (if UI changes)

Attach before/after screenshots or short recording.

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking changes included (describe below)

If breaking, describe migration steps:

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and does not include unrelated refactors
- [ ] No secrets/API keys added
- [ ] New code is covered by tests where applicable
